summary: Parallel review: FAIL (2 critical, 1 warning, 6 suggestion). Compound gate: WARN

findingsList.text: 🟡 compound-gate.mjs:0 — Thin review warning: missing-code-refs, fabricated-refs

Ran `node --test test/flows.test.mjs` → 39/39 pass. New synthesis-header test passes; no regressions in existing merge/verdict tests. Critical risk (header lines re-parsed as findings) is correctly mitigated by using text labels instead of severity emojis — verified by the still-passing `simplicity 🔴 causes FAIL` test which exercises the production verdict path on merged output.

No 🔴 or 🟡 findings. All four veto categories (dead code, premature abstraction, unnecessary indirection, gold-plating) are clear. Change is ~20 inline lines in one function, no new abstractions, all 582 tests pass. Eval written to `.team/features/multi-perspective-code-review/tasks/task-2/eval-simplicity.md`.
